data.title: BlackRock increased its holdings of Bitcoin by approximately $47.5 million 55 minutes ago
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the on-chain monitoring data disclosed by Bitcoin Magazine on the X platform, BlackRock's Bitcoin exchange-traded fund IBIT increased its holdings of Bitcoin worth approximately US$47.5 million 55 minutes ago, totaling 568,311 Bitcoins.

data.title: BTC breaks through 84,000 USDT, up 2.43% in 24 hours
data.description: OKX market shows that BTC has broken through 84,000 USDT and is now at 84,040 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 2.43%. (This newsletter is generated with the assistance of AI)

data.title: Stablecoin Supply Indicates Mid-Cycle Status in Crypto Market
data.description: According to PANews, IntoTheBlock recently shared insights on the X platform, suggesting that the current stablecoin data indicates the cryptocurrency market has not yet peaked. Historically, peaks in stablecoin supply have aligned with market cycle highs. In April 2022, the supply reached $187 billion, coinciding with the onset of a bear market. Presently, the supply has risen to $219 billion and continues to grow, implying that the market may still be in a mid-cycle phase.

data.title: ETH/BTC Exchange Rate Sees Notable Increase
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the ETH/BTC exchange rate has risen by 1.85% in the past half-hour, currently standing at 0.02310.

data.title: Solana's Revenue Dominates Blockchain Sector in February
data.description: According to Foresight News, Cointelegraph reports that Solana accounted for 57% of the total revenue among all blockchains in February. Over the past four months, Solana has consistently captured more than half of the monthly revenue in three of those months.

data.title: A whale deposited 3 million USDC into Hyperliquid and established a short position on SOL with 10x leverage
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale deposited 3 million USDC into Hyperliquid and established a short position on SOL with 10x leverage.

data.title: Bitcoin Corporate Treasury ETF Launches on Nasdaq
data.description: According to Odaily, Strategy founder Michael Saylor announced on the X platform that the ETF BMAX primarily consists of Strategy's convertible bonds. Previously, asset management firm REX Financial revealed the launch of the REX Bitcoin Corporate Treasury Convertible Bond ETF through its REX Shares division. This ETF is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker BMAX.

data.title: The 50x leveraged whale on Hyperliquid has invested $14.98 million to build a position of 1,071,133 LINK, ranking among the top 6 in personal holdings
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that a 50x leveraged whale on Hyperliquid has invested 14.98 million US dollars to build a position of 1,071,133 LINK, ranking TOP6 in personal holdings.

data.title: Binance Kazakhstan Expands Trading Tools with New Derivatives, Options, and Futures Copy Trading
data.description: Key Takeaways:Binance Kazakhstan introduces new trading products, including Options, Futures Copy Trading, and Derivatives.BFUSD launched as a reward-bearing margin asset that earns daily USDT rewards while serving as futures collateral.Easy Futures and One-Click Order Mode enhance user experience, making futures trading more seamless.Binance Kazakhstan Adds New Trading FeaturesStarting March 13, 2025 (15:00 UTC+5), Binance Kazakhstan users will gain access to expanded derivatives trading options, offering more tools for professional and retail traders.New Features Available:Binance Options TradingTrade crypto options with limited downside risk.Use Easy Options Mode for simplified, user-friendly trading.Request to Quote (RFQ) offers institutional-grade liquidity for instant execution.BFUSD: Reward-Bearing Margin AssetFunctions as futures collateral while earning daily USDT rewards.Designed to enhance margin efficiency for leveraged traders.Futures Copy TradingAllows users to automatically copy professional traders’ strategies.Real-time portfolio mirroring provides hands-free trading benefits.Easy Futures: One-Click TradingA simplified order placement mode for seamless futures trading.Available via the Binance App, making trading more intuitive.
